message:
fix(daemon): cleanup clippy lints and improve rerank test clarity

- client.rs: replace catch-all `_` with explicit InferenceMode::Direct
  match arm for better exhaustiveness checking.
- core.rs: remove unnecessary .clone() on socket_path (already owned
  by default()).
- daemon_e2e.rs: rename test_rerank_empty_model_string to
  test_rerank_with_no_model_specified, clarify docs to explain that
  None becomes "default" via client.rerank() unwrap_or, tighten
  inline comments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
